reference: I have impacted wisdom teeth. I have been experiencing severe pain on and off for about a year, but now it has gotten worse with different symptoms along with the pain, like a funny taste in my mouth, mild trouble swallowing, chest pains, and shortness of breath. Is this an emergency?
